findings.summary: Cetirizine is primarily renally excreted (60–70%) and undergoes minimal hepatic CYP-mediated metabolism; Withania somnifera root extract lacks documented pharmacokinetic interactions with renally-eliminated drugs, and no case reports or clinical studies identify a meaningful pharmacokinetic interaction between cetirizine and Ashwagandha.
findings.citation: Natural Medicines Database (accessed 2024); cetirizine pharmacokinetics review
